title: Project Setup Automation Script
description: Build a script initializing project folder with `.venv`, `requirements.txt`, and `.gitignore`.
solution:
import os
def init_project(path):
    os.makedirs(path, exist_ok=True)
    with open(os.path.join(path, '.gitignore'), 'w') as f:
        f.write('.venv/\n__pycache__/\n')
    with open(os.path.join(path, 'requirements.txt'), 'w') as f:
        f.write('# Dependencies\n')
    return True
solutionExpl: Automates setup of clean project environment files.
